title: aphania senegalensis
intro: Aphania senegalensis, also known as African tea or Yerba de Toro, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aphania senegalensis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which is traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
